title: Grading Scale
content: The university uses a 4.0 grading scale. A=4.0, B=3.0, C=2.0, D=1.0, F=0.0.

title: Credit Requirements
content: To graduate with a Bachelor's degree, students must complete at least 120 credit hours.

title: Incomplete Grades
content: An 'I' grade may be given if a student cannot complete coursework due to illness or emergency. It must be resolved within one semester.

title: Academic Probation
content: Students with a cumulative GPA below 2.0 will be placed on academic probation.

title: Course Load
content: A full-time student must take at least 12 credits per semester. Maximum load is 18 credits.

title: Major Declaration
content: Students must declare a major before completing 60 credit hours.
